name: playwright-devops
tagline: Index skill pointing to CI failure analysis and log-fetching guides for Playwright GitHub Actions workflows.
verdict: Thin index-only SKILL.md whose two referenced files (commit-failures.md, fetch-commit-logs.sh) aren't part of this content; visible text is safe but omits output contract, failure handling, negative triggers, and versioning.

highlights.summary: No 'NOT for' / out-of-scope guidance anywhere in the description or body.
No format or location stated for the 'CI Commit Failure Report' deliverable.
No handling for missing gh CLI, auth failure, or absent commit logs across the two guides.
